DEFENDANT FAILED TO CURE ITS VIOLATION OF THE APRIL 3, 2013 COURT ORDER IMMEDIATELY AFTER NOTICE OF VIOLATION. SEE BRENDA CRUZ KEITH LETTER DATED 10/15/2013 AND JOHN SOWERS DECLARATION 7-8. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $1,000 TO THE COURT WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO ITS ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 19, 2013. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF REPLY FILED ON DECEMBER 6, 2013.JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-19-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE THAT (1) UNSPECIFIED BID WAS SUBMITTED (REZAIAN DECLARATION 2); (2) BID WAS ACCEPTED ON "SPECIFIC TERMS OF THE PURCHASE AGREEMENT WITH JOINT ESCROW INSTRUCTIONS" (EX. 4 TO REZAIAN DECLARATION), WHICH AGREEMENT WAS NOT PROVIDED AS EVIDENCE; (3) ACCEPTANCE WAS SUBJECT TO UNIDENTIFIED "NECESSARY STEPS" (EX. 4 TO REZAIAN DECLARATION); AND THAT (4) ONLY PLAINTIFF EXECUTED A DOCUMENT TITLED "SUPPLEMENTAL ESCROW INSTRUCTIONS," DOES NOT ESTABLISH AN EXISTENCE OF A VALID CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS ARE SUSTAINED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq.,(415-626-6494) for M & M Investment, Plaintiff and moving party.
Clayton Gaddis, Esq., of Severson & Werson (415-398-3344) for Wells Fargo Bank, Defendant and opposing party.

Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to shift burden. Plaintiff's evidence that (1) unspecified bid was submitted (Rezaian Declaration 2); (2) bid was accepted on "specific terms of the Purchase Agreement with Joint Escrow Instructions" (Ex. 4 to Rezaian Declaration), which Agreement was not provided as evidence; (3) acceptance was subject to unidentified "necessary steps" (Ex. 4 to Rezaian Declaration); and that (4) only Plaintiff executed a document titled "Supplemental Escrow Instructions," does not establish an existence of a valid contract. Plaintiff's objections are sustained. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Continued To Dec-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Continued to December 19, 2013. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copy of reply filed on December 6, 2013.Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

To Show Cause Re: Contempt.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq., (415-626-6494) for M & M Investment Partners, Plaintiff and moving party.
Clayton Gaddis, Esq (415-398-3344) for Wells Fargo Bank, Defendant and opposing party.

Argued. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt is GRANTED. Defendant fails to provide any evidence in support of its opposition. Defendant failed to cure its violation of the April 3, 2013 Court order immediately after notice of violation. See Brenda Cruz Keith Letter dated 10/15/2013 and John Sowers Declaration 7-8. Defendant shall pay $1,000 to the Court within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff is entitled to its attorney's fees. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
